ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "binary_type" TEXT /* Binary type of the publication */,
  "cross_type_collaboration" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is cross-type collaboration */,
  "international_collaboration" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is international collaboration */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the publication */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Field or discipline of the research */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the research */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is distributed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the publication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_name FOREIGN KEY ("journal_name") REFERENCES journals ("journal_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_research_field FOREIGN KEY ("research_field") REFERENCES research_fields ("field_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_funding_source FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the author contributed to */,
  "author_position" INTEGER /* Position of the author in the list of authors */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "openalex_author_id" TEXT /* OpenAlex identifier for the author */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the author's affiliation */,
  "affiliation_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the author's affiliation */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of the author's affiliation */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the corresponding author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the journal record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the journal record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the research field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research field record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the research field record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the funding source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the funding source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
